changeLog: ReaImGui port — native Chinese / Unicode input, no more Ctrl+E modal. Full UI rewrite from gfx to ReaImGui: InputTextMultiline handles IME directly, user messages render as terracotta bubbles, settings popup is an inline editable modal (Provider radio + Base URL / Model / API key / Search key with show/hide toggle), modal dim overlay disabled so main UI isn't greyed when settings opens. Status bar shows just the model name. ✱ thinking spinner pulses, role gaps between turns, ↓ jump-to-latest button when scrolled up. ReaImGui is now a hard dependency (install via ReaPack). chat / provider / http / tools / json unchanged.
